rationale: The auto-merge bot currently fails when pull requests include modifications to GitHub Actions workflows because it lacks the necessary GraphQL API permissions, creating a bottleneck in infrastructure continuous integration.

implementation_steps.description: Modify `.github/workflows/jules-auto-merge.yml` to explicitly include the `workflows: write` permission.

constraints: Do not alter the `if` condition that verifies the actor (`github.repository_owner` or `google-labs-jules[bot]`).
Do not add any other permissions beyond `workflows: write`.
